Who won the 2020 Formula 1 drivers champ: SELECT CONCAT(d.forename, ' ', d.surname) AS champion, ds.points AS total_points FROM fact_driver_standings ds JOIN dim_races r ON r.raceId = ds.raceId JOIN dim_drivers d ON d.driverId = ds.driverId WHERE r.year = 2020 AND r.round = (SELECT MAX(round) FROM dim_races WHERE year = 2020) AND ds.position = 1
Who won the 2019 British Grand Prix?: SELECT CONCAT(d.forename, ' ', d.surname) AS race_winner, c.name AS constructor FROM fact_results res JOIN dim_races r ON r.raceId = res.raceId JOIN dim_drivers d ON d.driverId = res.driverId JOIN dim_constructors c ON c.constructorId = res.constructorId WHERE r.year = 2019 AND r.name = 'British Grand Prix' AND res.positionOrder = 1
Which drivers retired due to engine fail: SELECT CONCAT(d.forename, ' ', d.surname) AS driver_name, r.name AS race_name, r.year FROM fact_results res JOIN dim_races r ON r.raceId = res.raceId JOIN dim_drivers d ON d.driverId = res.driverId JOIN dim_status s ON s.statusId = res.statusId WHERE r.year = 2018 AND s.status = 'Engine' ORDER BY r.round
How many race wins does each constructor: SELECT TOP 5 c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(*) AS race_wins FROM fact_results res JOIN dim_constructors c ON c.constructorId = res.constructorId WHERE res.positionOrder = 1 GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY race_wins DESC
